news.title:
Kotak Mahindra AMC's $3B fund bets on defense, financial stocks, with Astra Microwave, Bharat Electronics as key holdings.
Defense firms gain from policy support, while financials like HDFC Bank, IndusInd Bank, and Bajaj Finance attract post-selloff interest.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra AMC's $3B fund bets on defense, financial stocks, with Astra Microwave, Bharat Electronics as key holdings.
Defense firms gain from policy support, while financials like HDFC Bank, IndusInd Bank, and Bajaj Finance attract post-selloff interest.

news.title:
Labour unrest in Noida affects auto, electronics, and garment sectors, raising concerns over wage hikes and operational risks.
Key impacted stocks include Motherson, Maruti Suzuki, Dixon, BEL, Asian Paints, and Dabur, though no major operational hits reported yet.
news.summary:
Labour unrest in Noida affects auto, electronics, and garment sectors, raising concerns over wage hikes and operational risks.
Key impacted stocks include Motherson, Maruti Suzuki, Dixon, BEL, Asian Paints, and Dabur, though no major operational hits reported yet.

news.title:
Nuvama highlights BEL, Data Patterns, and Solar Industries as top defence picks with 6%-43% upside.
Focus shifts to execution quality; BEL, HAL face delays, while DPIL and SOIL show stronger execution.
news.summary:
Nuvama highlights BEL, Data Patterns, and Solar Industries as top defence picks with 6%-43% upside.
Focus shifts to execution quality; BEL, HAL face delays, while DPIL and SOIL show stronger execution.

news.title:
India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence push benefits Bharat Electronics (BEL), Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL), and Bharat Dynamics (BDL). BEL leads in air defence tech and radar systems.
HAL focuses on Su-30 engine overhauls and transport aircraft, while BDL excels in missile systems and anti-tank weapons with strong order pipelines.
news.summary:
India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence push benefits Bharat Electronics (BEL), Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL), and Bharat Dynamics (BDL). BEL leads in air defence tech and radar systems.
HAL focuses on Su-30 engine overhauls and transport aircraft, while BDL excels in missile systems and anti-tank weapons with strong order pipelines.

news.title:
BEL receives 75 hectares in Chitrakoot node of UP Defence Corridor.
CM Yogi Adityanath handed over the allotment letter to BEL CMD Manoj Jain.
news.summary:
BEL receives 75 hectares in Chitrakoot node of UP Defence Corridor.
CM Yogi Adityanath handed over the allotment letter to BEL CMD Manoj Jain.

news.title:
BEL begins ₹562 cr investment in UPDIC with 75-hectare land in Chitrakoot.
Production of defence systems to commence as part of the initiative.
news.summary:
BEL begins ₹562 cr investment in UPDIC with 75-hectare land in Chitrakoot.
Production of defence systems to commence as part of the initiative.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal favors L&T, Cummins, Siemens Energy in capital goods; BEL leads in defense.
Sector resilient despite geopolitical tensions; strong order books, growth trends drive optimism.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal favors L&T, Cummins, Siemens Energy in capital goods; BEL leads in defense.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang cut estimates for defence stocks, citing market corrections, risks.
Stocks like BEL, HAL face mixed impacts from Iran-Israel conflict, cost pressures.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang cut estimates for defence stocks, citing market corrections, risks.
Stocks like BEL, HAL face mixed impacts from Iran-Israel conflict, cost pressures.

news.title:
HAL, BEL, and other defence stocks are set to benefit from geopolitical tensions and India's rising defence deals with Germany, France, and Israel.
HAL's revenue rose 10.7% YoY; BEL's surged 23.7% YoY, driven by strong order books. Defence budget hike to 15.2% in FY26-27 boosts growth.
news.summary:
HAL, BEL, and other defence stocks are set to benefit from geopolitical tensions and India's rising defence deals with Germany, France, and Israel.
HAL's revenue rose 10.7% YoY; BEL's surged 23.7% YoY, driven by strong order books. Defence budget hike to 15.2% in FY26-27 boosts growth.

news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends buying Tata Consumer Products, BEL, and ACME Solar Holdings on April 6, 2026.
Tata Consumer, BEL, and ACME Solar show bullish patterns, indicating potential reversals and uptrends.
news.summary:

news.title:
Motilal Oswal sees value as Nifty 50 trades at 17.7x P/E, a 15% discount to historical LPA. Key picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, BEL.
Top sectors: Auto, PSU Banks, Technology; Neutral on Telecom, Cement. Midcap correction noted; largecaps preferred for investments.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal sees value as Nifty 50 trades at 17.7x P/E, a 15% discount to historical LPA. Key picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, BEL.
Top sectors: Auto, PSU Banks, Technology; Neutral on Telecom, Cement. Midcap correction noted; largecaps preferred for investments.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
Nomura maintains Neutral on Bharat Electronics with a target of Rs 435, citing strong FY26 order inflow of Rs 301bn.
Expected 12%/9% YoY 4QFY26 revenue/EBITDA growth, but valuation concerns at 45x/39x FY27/28E limit upside.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains Neutral on Bharat Electronics with a target of Rs 435, citing strong FY26 order inflow of Rs 301bn.
Expected 12%/9% YoY 4QFY26 revenue/EBITDA growth, but valuation concerns at 45x/39x FY27/28E limit upside.

news.title:
CLSA maintains Outperform on Bharat Electronics, raising target price to Rs 522.
65% FY26 order inflow, $6.5bn orders expected; key catalysts: QRSAM, S-400, 5th-gen fighter bids.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains Outperform on Bharat Electronics, raising target price to Rs 522.
65% FY26 order inflow, $6.5bn orders expected; key catalysts: QRSAM, S-400, 5th-gen fighter bids.

news.title: Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Bharat Electronics with a revised target of 475.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Bharat Electronics with a revised target of 475.

Govt intervenes to control ATF price hike, aiding related sectors.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:

Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
BEL's FY26 revenue rose 16.2% YoY to ₹26,750 crore.
Orders secured totaled ₹30,000 crore, including ₹346 million in exports.
news.summary:
BEL's FY26 revenue rose 16.2% YoY to ₹26,750 crore.
Orders secured totaled ₹30,000 crore, including ₹346 million in exports.

news.title:
Bharat Electronics posted a record turnover of Rs 26,750 Cr in FY25-26, up 16.2%.
Export sales grew 33.7% to $141.9M; order book stands at Rs 74,000 Cr.
news.summary:
Bharat Electronics posted a record turnover of Rs 26,750 Cr in FY25-26, up 16.2%.
Export sales grew 33.7% to $141.9M; order book stands at Rs 74,000 Cr.

news.title:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.
news.summary:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.
